chapters.title: Zeroth and First Laws
chapters.transcript: Temperature equilibrium. Internal energy, heat, work. Conservation of energy: ΔU = Q - W.

chapters.title: Second Law
chapters.transcript: Entropy always increases. Clausius and Kelvin statements. Heat engines and Carnot efficiency.

chapters.title: Third Law
chapters.transcript: Absolute zero unreachable. Entropy of perfect crystal is zero at T=0.

chapters.title: Thermodynamic Potentials
chapters.transcript: Enthalpy, Helmholtz free energy, Gibbs free energy. Maxwell relations.

chapters.title: Statistical Mechanics
chapters.transcript: Microstates and macrostates. Boltzmann entropy S = k log W. Partition function.
